name: attitude_is_assertable_through_provenance
group: Y - attitude and theory of mind (4.0.0)
note: 4.0.0 Rule 25: an assertion ABOUT an attitude identifier is schema-valid (the about pattern widened in 4.0.0) and verifies; the attitude's HOLDER (a modeled agent) and the assertion's SOURCE (a signing key) are demonstrably different things.
